title: calcAvlCropland — calcAvlCropland
text: marginal_land Defines share marginal land included (see options )                whether suitable land irrigated conditions ("irrigated"), rainfed conditions ("rainfed")                suitability rainfed conditions including currently irrigated land (rainfed_and_irrigated)                used. Options combined via ":"                different marginal land options : "all_marginal": marginal land (suitability index 0-0.33) included suitable "q33_marginal": bottom tertile (suitability index 0.13) marginal land area excluded. "q50_marginal": bottom  half (suitability index 0.18) marginal land area excluded. "q66_marginal": first second tertile (suitability index 0.23) marginal land area excluded. "q75_marginal": first, second third quartiles (suitability index 0.25) marginal land excluded "no_marginal": Areas suitability index 0.33 lower excluded. "magpie": Returns "all_marginal:rainfed_and_irrigated",                        "q33_marginal:rainfed_and_irrigated"                        "no_marginal:rainfed_and_irrigated"                        magclass object used magpie input. cell_upper_bound Upper bound cropland grid cell level. Even , instance, total available cropland area equals land area grid cell, cropland expanded value. country_level Whether output shall country level. Requires aggregate=FALSE calcOutput. cells (deprecated) lpjcell (67420 cells) luhBaseYear Base year LUH land area

text: consvBaseYear Reference year land conservation. Chosing "y1750", instance, means reference land use based year 1750 ('pre-industrial') land use can restored pre-industrial state conservation priority areas. year available LUH3 data set can chosen. Historic land use LUH3 data based HYDE data base. choice "y2020" provides special case, reference land use based 2020 ESA CCI LULC map, derived spatial resolution 300 x 300 Meter. cells (deprecated) number cells landmask ("lpjcell" 67420 cells) nclasses Options either "seven" "nine". "seven" separates primary secondary forest includes "crop", "past", "forestry", "primforest", "secdforest", "urban" "" "nine" adds separation pasture rangelands, well differentiation primary secondary non-forest vegetation therefore returns "crop", "past", "range", "forestry", "primforest", "secdforest", "urban", "primother" "secdother" baseYearIPLCLand Whether reference year land conservation "consvBaseYear" also also applied IPLC land. default FALSE avoid land-use change IPLC land.

title: readZabel2014 — readZabel2014
text: Reads crop suitability data published Zabel, F., Putzenlechner, B., & Mauser, W. (2014). Global Agricultural Land Resources – High Resolution Suitability Evaluation Perspectives 2100 Climate Change Conditions. PLOS ONE, 9(9), e107522. https://doi.org/10.1371/journal.pone.0107522 extracts share suitable cropland per grid cell, depending different suitability thresholds.

title: readZabel2014 — readZabel2014
text: subtype Defines share marginal land included (see options )                whether suitable land irrigated conditions ("irrigated"), rainfed conditions ("rainfed")                suitability rainfed conditions including currently irrigated land (rainfed_and_irrigated)                used. Options combined via ":"                different marginal land options : "all_marginal": marginal land (suitability index 0-0.33) included suitable "q33_marginal": bottom tertile (suitability index 0.13) marginal land () area excluded. "q50_marginal": bottom half (suitability index 0.18) marginal land area excluded. "q66_marginal": first second tertile (suitability index 0.23) marginal land area excluded. "q75_marginal": first, second third quartiles (suitability index 0.25) marginal land excluded "no_marginal": Areas suitability index 0.33 lower excluded.
